ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "shape0" INTEGER /* First dimension of the image shape */,
  "shape1" INTEGER /* Second dimension of the image shape */,
  "shape2" INTEGER /* Third dimension of the image shape (color channels) */,
  "max" INTEGER /* Maximum color value in the image */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minimum color value in the image */,
  "variance" INTEGER /* Variance of color values in the image */,
  "num_pixels" INTEGER /* Total number of pixels in the image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1080p, 4K) */,
  "average_color" TEXT /* Average color value of the image */,
  "dominant_colors" TEXT /* Most frequent colors in the image */,
  "edge_density" REAL /* Density of edges in the image */,
  "bluriness" REAL /* Measure of the image's sharpness */,
  "metadata_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  "image_tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels associated with the image for easier querying */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image file */,
  "image_id" TEXT /* Reference to the image metadata */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the image is stored */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., image, video) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the file (e.g., cloud, on-premises) */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Last date and time the file was accessed */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the file has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_files_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions or roles the user has */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Last date and time the password was changed */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
